nasb.text: The sin of Judah is written down with an iron stylus; With a diamond point it is engraved upon the tablet of their heart And on the horns of their altars,

esv.text: “The sin of Judah is written with a pen of iron; with a point of diamond it is engraved on the tablet of their heart, and on the horns of their altars,

cnv.text: “猶大的罪是用鐵筆銘記的，是用金鋼鑽刻在他們的心版上，和他們祭壇的角上。

ccb.text: “犹大人的罪是用铁笔记录的，用钻石镌刻的，写在了他们心坎上和祭坛角上。
